info.title: AutoSend API
info.description: AutoSend REST API for managing project webhooks. These endpoints accept a project API key (AS_ prefix) and let you subscribe to email and contact events, inspect delivery logs, and test deliveries.

get.description: Retrieves all webhooks for the authenticated project. Supports filtering by active state and pagination. Secrets are never included in list responses.

post.description: Creates a new webhook subscribed to one or more events. The signing secret is returned only on creation — store it securely, as it cannot be retrieved again except via the reveal endpoint.

get.description: Retrieves a single webhook by its ID. The webhook must belong to the authenticated project. The signing secret is not included.

put.description: Updates a webhook's URL, subscribed events, active state, or metadata. The signing secret is immutable — create a new webhook to rotate it.

delete.description: Deletes a webhook by its ID. The webhook must belong to the authenticated project.

get.description: Retrieves the delivery attempt history for a webhook, including response status and timestamps. Supports pagination.
Returns the raw signing secret for a webhook so you can verify payload signatures. The webhook must belong to the authenticated organization.

post.description: Queues a test delivery of a given event to the webhook's URL. The webhook must be subscribed to the supplied event.
